title: Assist with feeding in a production system
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist with feeding in a production system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare and distribute feed

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor daily feeding program requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor daily feeding program requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor daily feeding program requirements.

pcs.text: Select and check tools, machinery and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and check tools, machinery and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and check tools, machinery and equipment.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Use correct manual handling techniques when loading and unloading materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use correct manual handling techniques when loading and unloading materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use correct manual handling techniques when loading and unloading materials.

pcs.text: Provide assistance for weighing and measuring feed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide assistance for weighing and measuring feed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide assistance for weighing and measuring feed.

pcs.text: Collect and distribute feed from silos or other storage areas
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and distribute feed from silos or other storage areas?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and distribute feed from silos or other storage areas.

pcs.text: Check automatic or computerised feeders, where used, for blockages and correct functioning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check automatic or computerised feeders, where used, for blockages and correct functioning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check automatic or computerised feeders, where used, for blockages and correct functioning.

pcs.text: Report feed stock abnormalities or irregularities to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report feed stock abnormalities or irregularities to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report feed stock abnormalities or irregularities to supervisor.
